name: Euro Kick Tournament
author: Poki
description: Euro Kick Tournament is an exciting football game where you can showcase your quick thinking and reaction time! Select a country to compete as, and take on an entire tournament in multiple rounds in competition for the grand prize. You can unlock different abilities to help you on your way of becoming the ultimate champion. Can you claim the tournament cup as your own? How do I play Euro Kick Tournament? Click with the mouse to select the location for where you want to kick the ball. Defend by clicking the correct option on the screen before the enemy kicks the ball. Use any abilities that you have unlocked by clicking on them. Who created Euro Kick Tournament? Euro Kick Tournament is created by Kayfo Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Euro Kick Tournament for free? You can play Euro Kick Tournament for free on Poki. Can I play Euro Kick Tournament on mobile devices and desktop? Euro Kick Tournament can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
